recommendations.title: Eve's Bayou
recommendations.overview: Summer heats up in rural Louisiana beside Eve’s Bayou, 1962, as the Batiste family tries to survive the secrets they’ve kept and the betrayals they’ve endured.

recommendations.title: Talk to Me
recommendations.overview: The story of Washington D.C. radio personality Ralph "Petey" Greene, an ex-con who became a popular talk show host and community activist in the 1960s.

recommendations.title: Harriet
recommendations.overview: The extraordinary tale of Harriet Tubman's escape from slavery and transformation into one of America's greatest heroes. Her courage, ingenuity and tenacity freed hundreds of slaves and changed the course of history.

recommendations.title: Whitney Houston: I Wanna Dance with Somebody
recommendations.overview: The joyous, emotional, heartbreaking celebration of the life and music of Whitney Houston, the greatest female R&B pop vocalist of all time. Tracking her journey from obscurity to musical superstardom.

recommendations.title: Rear Window
recommendations.overview: A wheelchair-bound photographer spies on his neighbors from his apartment window and becomes convinced one of them has committed murder.

recommendations.title: School Daze
recommendations.overview: Fraternity and sorority members clash with other students at a historically black college during homecoming weekend.

recommendations.title: M.F.A.
recommendations.overview: After the accidental death of her rapist, an art student becomes an unlikely vigilante, set out to avenge college girls whose rapists were not charged.

recommendations.title: Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Ben, a journalist from New York City, travels to West Texas in order to investigate the death of a girl he was hooking up with while recording a murder mystery podcast along the way.

recommendations.title: Arena
recommendations.overview: David Lord finds himself forced into the savage world of a modern gladiatorial arena, where men fight to the death for the entertainment of the online masses.

recommendations.title: Damaged
recommendations.overview: A Chicago detective travels to Scotland after an emerging serial killer’s crimes match those that he investigated five years earlier, one of which was the crime scene of his murdered girlfriend.
